faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.item0Answer: Welfare Plus is a Finland-based business organization affiliated to organizations abroad, dedicated to improving wellbeing across countries and communities through social work research, assistive products, and social program development.
faq.item1Question: How can I benefit from Welfare Plus services?
faq.item1Answer: You can benefit through our assistive technology products, social work research, program development initiatives, and partnerships that support inclusive social welfare.
faq.item2Question: How do I become part of Welfare Plus?
faq.item2Answer: Contact us through our website or email to explore partnership and collaboration opportunities.
faq.item3Answer: Yes, we offer customized assistive technology solutions tailored to specific population groups and regional needs.
faq.item4Answer: Welfare Plus adheres to relevant national legal and regulatory frameworks and follows the code of conduct aligned with Social Work England's regulatory framework.

hero.description: Welfare Plus is an internationally oriented social welfare organization delivering research, social programs, and assistive solutions across diverse social and regulatory environments.

story.heading: Welcome To
story.p1: Welfare Plus is a Finland-based business organization affiliated to organizations abroad, and we are dedicated to improving wellbeing across countries and communities.
story.p2: We sell assistive technologies and independent living solutions that enable individuals - especially vulnerable populations - to live safely, independently, and with dignity. Welfare Plus also focuses on improving access to essential services such as housing, healthcare, education, employment, and social care.
story.p3: Our approach integrates generalist social work practice with international specialization and we support private sector actors, government organizations, civil society organizations, and communities to improve wellbeing in contemporary market-driven economies, where social welfare is jointly delivered by public institutions, businesses, civil society, and families.
story.p4: Through partnerships with academia, governments, businesses, civil society organizations, and financial institutions, Welfare Plus pioneers access to general and customized assistive technologies and serves as an international representative for manufacturers. We also engage in advocacy for inclusive social security systems and safeguarding frameworks.
story.p5: NB: Welfare Plus is non-segregating in dealing with government and political parties. As consultant, we are open to partnering with all levels of government, and political parties to help develop different welfare programs and initiatives for the people.

ethics.heading: Professional Standards and Ethics
ethics.p1: For International and collaborative social care services and strategic social programs needing professional standards and data protection, Welfare Plus program director is registered with Social Work England (and has been registered for over one-and-a-half decades from when it was named General Social Care Council) and duly authorized to use the professional title 'Social Worker'.
ethics.p2: Therefore, Welfare Plus in-house international code of conduct for staff aligns overtly with the regulatory framework of Social Work England (established by the Children and Social Work 2017, and supported by the Social Workers Regulations 2018, as amended).
ethics.p3: In Finland, sub-Saharan Africa, and possibly in the United States and elsewhere, Welfare Plus adheres to relevant national legal and regulatory frameworks while promoting comparative, evidence-based, and ethically grounded social work practice.

mission.missionText: To advance inclusive social welfare systems, expand access to assistive technologies, and promote holistic wellbeing through research, partnerships, and innovative social programs.
mission.visionText: A world where all people - regardless of age, ability, or location - have access to essential social welfare services and opportunities to live independently and with dignity.

EuropeHero.heading: Europe's Hub for Inclusive Welfare Innovation
EuropeHero.description: Welfare Plus (in Finland) collaborates with international partners to represent manufacturers of the best assistive technologies and independent living devices. These partnerships support market access, distribution, and the implementation of inclusive social welfare and development programs across Europe.

AfricaHero.heading: Africa's Hub for Inclusive Welfare Innovation
AfricaHero.description: Welfare Plus (in Finland) collaborates with Welfare-Plus Nigeria Limited to represent international manufacturers of the best assistive technologies and independent living devices. These partnerships support market access, distribution, and the implementation of inclusive social welfare and development programs across African countries.

ContactHero.headingPre: We're here to answer any question you may have &

EuropePage.hubTitle: Europe's Hub for Inclusive Welfare Innovation
EuropePage.hubDescription: Advancing Social Innovation and Assistive Technology Partnerships Across Europe. Welfare Plus Europe serves as the headquarters for international research, innovation, and partnerships in inclusive social welfare and independent living solutions.
EuropePage.featureContent: Welfare Plus facilitates assistive technology partnerships between Europe and Sub-Saharan Africa. Our focus is on independent living aids and assistive devices for children with special needs, persons with disabilities, older adults, and veterans. We also conduct social research, advocacy, and promote evidence-based social care innovations.
EuropePage.impactsContent:
Europe serves as the innovation and coordination hub supporting global knowledge exchange and technology transfer. 
 Collaboration with academic institutions, government agencies, and international manufacturers to develop scalable social care solutions.

AfricaPage.featureContent: Expanding Access to Inclusive Social Welfare and Assistive Technologies Across Africa. Welfare Plus supports inclusive development initiatives through regional partnerships that improve access to assistive technologies and social welfare programs.
AfricaPage.impactsContent:
Focused on improving access, affordability, and awareness of assistive technologies while supporting sustainable social development. 
Collaboration with academic institutions, government agencies, and international manufacturers to develop scalable social care solutions.

USPage.hubTitle: United States Hub for Social Welfare Innovation
USPage.hubDescription: Advancing Social Innovation and Assistive Technology Partnerships Across the United States. Welfare Plus explores partnerships and coordination in selected U.S. locations.
USPage.featureContent: Welfare Plus (in Finland) is exploring partnerships and coordinating agents in selected United States locations, including Texas, North Carolina, Virginia Beach, and New York, to strengthen international collaborations in assistive technology, therapy tools, social research, and social development programs.
USPage.impactsContent:
Europe serves as the innovation and coordination hub supporting global knowledge exchange and technology transfer. 
 Collaboration with academic institutions, government agencies, and international manufacturers to develop scalable social care solutions.
